channel.title: Java on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Java on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: setup-java v5.5.0: signature verification, Kona JDK, and Maven fixes
item.description:
setup-java v5.5.0 adds cryptographic signature verification for downloaded JDKs, support for Kona JDK, and several Maven-related fixes. It is the release over v5.4.0.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure AI Translator SDKs for the latest text translation API
item.description:
Azure AI Translator has released generally available SDKs for the latest text translation REST API. The GA SDKs are available for C#/.NET, Java, JavaScript, and Python.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: CodeQL 2.25.4 adds Swift 6.3.1 support, improvements to C# and Java, and more
item.description:
CodeQL 2.25.4 adds support for Swift 6.3.1 and includes improvements for C# and Java. The release also contains additional updates not detailed in the provided excerpt.

  • Source: GitHub
